channel.title: C++17 on ErrorCode — Error Code Reference & Solutions
channel.description: Recent content in C++17 on ErrorCode — Error Code Reference & Solutions

item.title: [Solution] C++ std::any_cast Error — Any Type Cast Fix
item.description:
[Solution] C++ std::any_cast Error — Any Type Cast Fix

A std::bad_any_cast is thrown when std::any_cast<T>() is called on a std::any that stores a different type than T. This exception inherits from std::bad_cast. The error occurs when the stored type doesn’t match the requested type.

Why std::any_cast Errors Occur

Common causes include casting to the wrong type, calling any_cast on an empty std::any, type confusion when storing derived types as base pointers, and using any_cast with reference types incorrectly.

item.title: [Solution] C++ std::optional Error — Optional Access Fix
item.description:
[Solution] C++ std::optional Error — Optional Access Fix

A std::optional error occurs when calling value() or dereferencing an optional that does not contain a value. This throws std::bad_optional_access. The error happens when code assumes a value exists without checking first.

Why std::optional Errors Occur

Common causes include calling value() without checking has_value(), dereferencing a default-constructed optional, optional becoming empty after reset() or operator=, and not handling the empty case when using optional return values.

item.title: [Solution] C++ std::variant Error — Variant Access Fix
item.description:
[Solution] C++ std::variant Error — Variant Access Fix

A std::variant error occurs when accessing a variant with the wrong type using std::get, or when the variant is valueless by exception. std::bad_variant_access is thrown on mismatched type access. Variants can also become valueless after a throwing assignment.

Why std::variant Errors Occur

Common causes include calling std::get<T> without checking which type is active, variant becoming valueless after a throwing move constructor, using std::get on a variant returned from an unknown source, and not handling all alternative types in visitation.
